query:
SELECT bl.id, bl.livestreamDate, bl.salesAmount, liv.name as liverName 
FROM brand_livestreams bl 
JOIN livers liv ON bl.liverId = liv.id 
WHERE liv.email = 'shihomi208@gmail.com' 
ORDER BY bl.livestreamDate DESC 
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT bl.id, bl.livestreamDate, bl.salesAmount, liv.name as liverName

JOIN livers liv ON bl.liverId = liv.id 
WHERE liv.email = 'shihomi208@gmail.com' 
ORDER BY bl.livestreamDate DESC 
LIMIT 5;
